title: OPTIONS COUNSELING - 211info
text: IMPACT NW SOUTHEAST MULTICULTURAL SENIOR CENTER OPTIONS COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Options counselors help individuals make informed decisions about long-term care. Counselors help individuals determine their strengths, needs, preferences, and unique situations. Provides information about support strategies, action plans, and tactics based on the choices available in the community. Clients must be able to follow through on taking actions to connect with community resources and referrals.. 4610 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: -Options Counseling: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, and their family members or caregivers -OAA: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 721-6760 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-6760 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Farsi, Russian, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Inner southeast Portland from the Willamette River to 82nd Avenue and from Burnside Street to the Clackamas County line (Multnomah County part of zip codes 97202, 97206, 97214, and 97215) SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * Older Adults Long Term Care Options Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - IMPACT KINCARE TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
